name: @srbde/pollen
description: Modern, secure, and zero-dependency TypeScript SDK for the Hive blockchain
author: Sustainable Resource and Business Development Enterprise (SRBDE)

scripts.build:node: tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir lib && pnpm run build:version
scripts.build:browser: esbuild src/index-browser.ts --bundle --minify --sourcemap --platform=browser --format=iife --global-name=pollen --outfile=dist/pollen.js --define:global=window --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='"production"' --alias:stream=stream-browserify --alias:events=events && esbuild src/index-browser.ts --bundle --minify --sourcemap --platform=browser --format=esm --outfile=dist/pollen.mjs --define:global=window --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='"production"' --alias:stream=stream-browserify --alias:events=events && gzip -9 -f -c dist/pollen.js > dist/pollen.js.gz
scripts.build: pnpm run build:node && pnpm run build:browser && pnpm run build:types
scripts.docs:api: typedoc --plugin typedoc-plugin-markdown --out docs/api src --entryFileName index.md --readme none
scripts.docs:build: pnpm run docs:api && vitepress build docs
